Title: The amara lace lace top & corset - black
Body (HTML):
Meet Solstice — a premium collection made for seamless day-to-night style. Designed for crisp evenings and cooler nights, featuring premium pieces designed to build your party-season wardrobe. Effortlessly sophisticated and perfect for the season, this collection is made for your most memorable moments.

  • Premium lace fabric
  • High neck silhouette
  • Discreet zip closure at the back for seamless finish
  • Designed to sculpt and flatter
  • Removable sculpting corset
  • Corset designed to layer over the lace top
  • Styled with our matching Amara lace trousers

Mary is 5’4 and wears size XS

Title: The burnout cowl top - cream
Body (HTML):
Introducing Casa del Sol - a sun-kissed collection of effortless staples designed to live in your wardrobe long after golden hour fades. Inspired by slow mornings, balmy nights, and Mediterranean escapes, each piece is made to be worn, reworn, and cherished.

The Burnout Cowl Top channels this spirit with its soft drape, delicate sheen, and romantic neckline. Designed to catch the light and turn heads, it’s an effortless statement - perfect for golden hour dinners, rooftop drinks, or wherever the warm breeze takes you.

Think timeless silhouettes with a romantic edge, curated in limited runs to keep you feeling one of a kind - wherever the sun takes you.

  • Double layered burnout fabric
  • Fully adjustable straps at the back
  • Backless
  • Cowl neck design 
  • Available in powder blue or cream
  • Wear on its own or part of a set 

 

Model measurements:

Emily is 5’7 and wears a size 6
Bust: 32''
Waist: 24’’
Hips: 34’’
Dress size: 6

The Burnout Cowl Top channels this spirit with its soft drape, delicate sheen, and romantic neckline. Designed to catch the light and turn heads, it’s an effortless statement - perfect for golden hour dinners, rooftop drinks, or wherever the warm breeze takes you.

Think timeless silhouettes with a romantic edge, curated in limited runs to keep you feeling one of a kind - wherever the sun takes you.

  • Double layered burnout fabric
  • Fully adjustable ties at the back
  • Backless
  • Cowl neck design 
  • Available in powder blue or cream
  • Wear on its own or part of a set

Title: The crochet foldover shorts - black & white
Body (HTML):
The ultimate Ibiza fit. Brought to you in a gorgeous crochet fabric and lined for comfort, we’re completely obsessed. Designed with versatility in mind, both tops and bottoms in this collection are available to mix & match with one another. Pair with your fav cowboy boots for a look that’s guaranteed to turn heads.

  • Made from crochet knit textured fabric
  • Lined with supersoft fabric so that it’s not see through
  • Fold over waistband with raw edge detailing
  • Elasticated waistband
  • Set sold separately
  • Sizing runs small so if inbetween sizes we would recommend sizing up

The ultimate Ibiza fit. Brought to you in a gorgeous crochet fabric and lined for comfort, we’re completely obsessed. Designed with versatility in mind, both tops and bottoms in this collection are available to mix & match with one another. Pair with your fav cowboy boots for a look that’s guaranteed to turn heads.

  • Made from crochet knit textured fabric
  • Lined with supersoft fabric so that it’s not see through
  • Fold over waistband with raw edge detailing
  • Elasticated waistband
  • Set sold separately
  • Sizing runs small so if inbetween sizes we would recommend sizing up

 

Model measurements:

Holly is 5’5 and wears a size 6
Bust: 32
Waist: 23’’
Hips: 34’’
Dress size: 4-6

Title: The crochet tan bikini bottoms -  mocha melt
Body (HTML):
The perfect tanning crochet bikini bottoms. Made with double-layered fabric and adjustable tie sides, allowing you to wear them at any height on your hips for a customizable fit. Designed with smaller panels to give you maximum tanning exposure and minimal tan lines, these bottoms are a fresh, feminine piece with a touch of effortless beach club charm.

With their delicate crochet detailing and flattering shape, these bikini bottoms are made to turn heads whether you’re lounging poolside or soaking up the sun. This is the swim staple you’ll be reaching for again and again all summer long.

  • Thick double layered quality lycra
  • Fully adjustable tie sides, made from stretchy cord
  • Strappy design for minimal tan lines
  • Pair with our matching tan bikini top

Holly is 5’5 and wears a size 4
Bust: 32A

Introducing Casa del Sol - a sun-kissed collection of effortless staples designed to live in your wardrobe long after golden hour fades. Inspired by slow mornings, balmy nights, and Mediterranean escapes, each piece is made to be worn, reworn, and cherished.

The Burnout Maxi Skirt captures this spirit with its flowing silhouette and delicate, semi-sheer texture - a romantic essential made for golden hours and beyond. Effortless yet elevated, it’s designed to move with you from sunlit strolls to candlelit dinners.

Think timeless silhouettes with a romantic edge, curated in limited runs to keep you feeling one of a kind - wherever the sun takes you.

  • Wear on its own or part of a set

Inspired by slow mornings, balmy nights, and Mediterranean escapes, each piece is made to be worn, reworn, and cherished. Think timeless silhouettes with a romantic edge, curated in limited runs to keep you feeling one of a kind wherever the sun takes you.

 

  • Thick double layered quality fabric
  • Fully adjustable halter neck & back tie straps, made from stretchy cord
  • Strappy design for minimal tan lines
  • Pair with our matching beaded bikini bottoms

Featuring a high cut fit specifically designed to sit at the perfect position on your hips to give you a snatched waist, this is sure to be your go-to swimsuit this summer.

  • High rise cut

Title: The lace trim bikini bottoms - blue floral
Body (HTML):
Step into endless summer with the Riviera Bloom collection. The lace trim bikini bottom effortlessly blends playful florals with dreamy coastal hues, crafted from premium lightweight fabric with a flattering cut and adjustable ties for versatile comfort and style. Inspired by sun-drenched days along the French Riviera, it captures the romance of the sea and the relaxed feel of endless summer.

With its luxurious texture and easy-to-wear design, this top is an essential piece for your sun-soaked adventures. Soak up the sun in style and confidence.

  • Premium double layered lycra
  • Bow detail on front
  • Lace edging details
  • Pair with our matching bikini top and wrap sarong

Model measurements:

Bust: 32''
Waist: 24’’
Hips: 34’’

The ultimate staple summer dress that you’ll be reaching for season in, season out. With its luxurious texture and easy-to-wear design, this top is an essential piece for your sun-soaked adventures. Soak up the sun in style and confidence.

  • Premium double-layered stretch fabric for a secure fit
  • Micro skirt style - can be worn at different waist height
  • Pair with our matching bikini top and bottoms 

Model measurements:

Emily is 5’7 and wears a size 6
Bust: 32''
Waist: 24’’
Hips: 34’’
Dress size: 6

Make a statement this vacay season with this gorgeous lace strappy O ring bikini and matching sarong. Featuring a floral lace pattern and a long wraparound tie, she really is the perfect set. A classic piece brought to you in 4 colours that you’ll be reaching for time and time again.

  • Long wide wraparound tie
  • Scallop edge detailing along the inner edges
  • Single layer lace sarong
  • Part of a matching 3 piece set which includes: bikini top, bikini bottoms, wraparound sarong

Model is 5’6 and wears a size XS

Title: The sequin cowl top - black
Body (HTML):
Introducing Ibiza Nights: a carefully curated collection of premium fabrics and ultra-flattering shapes, all perfect for those occasions that need that little bit of extra glam. The perfect blend of elegance and sparkle, with show-stopping pieces you can mix and match that you’ll be reaching for over and over again.

Among these stunning pieces is the sequin cowl top - designed to bring that signature Ibiza sparkle to your wardrobe. With its shimmering fabric and flowing silhouette, it’s the ideal statement piece to elevate any outfit, whether you’re dancing the night away or enjoying a sunset soirée.

  • Adjustable straps
  • Open back 
  • Double layered 
  • Cowl neck design 
  • Wear on its own or part of a set 

Model measurements:

Holly is 5’5 and wears a size XS
Bust: 32A
Waist: 23’’
Hips: 34’’
Dress size: 4-6

Please note due to the delicate nature of the fabric sequins may shed - this is not a fault of the product.

The bikini of the season. Turn heads this summer in our wide band bikini set - the ultimate flattering fit. Featuring double layered fabric in a stylish wide band cut designed to sit on your hips at the perfect height, this is the staple swim you’ll be reaching for again and again.

  • Thick double layered quality lycra
  • Stretchy fabric, slip on style
  • Bow style design, ruched strap detail
  • Wide band straps for that ultra flattering fit
  • Pair with our matching wide band bikini bottoms


Model measurements:

Holly is 5’5 and wears a size 4
Bust: 32A
Waist: 23’’
Hips: 34’’
Dress size: 4-6

The bikini of the season. Turn heads this summer in our wide band bikini set - the ultimate flattering fit. Featuring double layered fabric in a stylish wide band cut designed to sit on your hips at the perfect height, this is the staple swim you’ll be reaching for again and again.

  • Thick double layered quality lycra
  • Stretchy fabric, slip on style
  • Wide band straps for that ultra flattering fit
  • Pair with our matching wide band bikini bottoms

If in-between sizes we recommend to size up as this item is small fitting.

Model is 5’6 and wears a size 6

Title: The tan bikini bottoms - mocha
Body (HTML):
The perfect tanning bikini. Made with double layered fabric with adjustable tie sides, meaning you can wear her at any height on your hips. Featuring smaller panels designed to give you maximum tanning exposure & minimal tan lines. This is the swim staple you’ll be grabbing over and over again.

  • Thick double layered quality lycra

  • Strappy design for minimal tan lines
  • Pair with our matching tan bikini top

  • Part of a matching 3 piece set which includes: bikini top, bikini bottoms, wraparound sarong

Title: The V bikini top - black
Body (HTML):
Make a statement this vacay season with our gorgeous statement swim. Featuring gold metal V bar detailing for that luxurious feel, and in tones to compliment your tan, she really is the perfect set. A classic and versatile piece that you’ll be reaching for time and time again.

  • Gold V bar hardware
  • Double layered stretchy high quality lycra, inner lining is made with the same outer fabric
  • Fully adjustable tie at the back
  • Bandeau design for minimal tan lines

  • Pair with our matching tan bikini top

The bikini of the season. Turn heads this summer in our wide band bikini set - the ultimate flattering fit. Featuring double layered fabric in a stylish wide band cut designed to sit on your hips at the perfect height, this is the staple swim you’ll be reaching for again and again.

  • Stretchy fabric, slip on style

Title: The crochet foldover shorts - mocha melt
Body (HTML):
The ultimate Ibiza fit. Brought to you in a gorgeous crochet fabric and lined for comfort, we’re completely obsessed. Designed with versatility in mind, both tops and bottoms in this collection are available to mix & match with one another. Pair with your fav cowboy boots for a look that’s guaranteed to turn heads.

Title: The crochet tan bikini bottoms -  mocha melt
Body (HTML):
The perfect tanning crochet bikini bottoms. Made with double-layered fabric and adjustable tie sides, allowing you to wear them at any height on your hips for a customizable fit. Designed with smaller panels to give you maximum tanning exposure and minimal tan lines, these bottoms are a fresh, feminine piece with a touch of effortless beach club charm.

With their delicate crochet detailing and flattering shape, these bikini bottoms are made to turn heads whether you’re lounging poolside or soaking up the sun. This is the swim staple you’ll be reaching for again and again all summer long.

  • Fully adjustable tie sides, made from stretchy cord
  • Strappy design for minimal tan lines
  • Pair with our matching tan bikini top

The bikini top of the season and the perfect tanning bikini. Our crochet triangle bikini top is made with double-layered fabric and features fully adjustable neck and back tie straps for a flawless, customizable fit. Designed with smaller panels to give you maximum tanning exposure and minimal tan lines, it’s a fresh, feminine piece with a touch of effortless beach club charm.

With its intricate crochet detailing and flattering silhouette, this bikini is made to turn heads whether you’re lounging poolside or soaking up the sun. This is the swim staple you’ll be grabbing over and over again all summer long.

  • Thick double layered fabric
  • Fully adjustable halter neck & back tie straps, made from stretchy cord
  • Strappy design for minimal tan lines
  • Pair with our matching tan bikini bottoms

Model measurements:

Holly is 5’5 and wears a size 4
Bust: 32A
Waist: 23’’
Hips: 34’’
Dress size: 4-6

Title: The sequin cowl top - powder blue
Body (HTML):
Introducing Ibiza Nights: a carefully curated collection of premium fabrics and ultra-flattering shapes, all perfect for those occasions that need that little bit of extra glam. The perfect blend of elegance and sparkle, with show-stopping pieces you can mix and match that you’ll be reaching for over and over again.

Among these stunning pieces is the sequin cowl top - designed to bring that signature Ibiza sparkle to your wardrobe. With its shimmering fabric and flowing silhouette, it’s the ideal statement piece to elevate any outfit, whether you’re dancing the night away or enjoying a sunset soirée.

  • Adjustable straps
  • Open back 
  • Fully lined 
  • Cowl neck design 
  • Wear on its own or part of a set 

Model measurements:

Holly is 5’5 and wears a size XS
Bust: 32A
Waist: 23’’
Hips: 34’’
Dress size: 4-6

Please note due to the delicate nature of the fabric sequins may shed - this is not a fault of the product.

Title: The burnout cowl top - powder blue
Body (HTML):
Introducing Casa del Sol - a sun-kissed collection of effortless staples designed to live in your wardrobe long after golden hour fades. Inspired by slow mornings, balmy nights, and Mediterranean escapes, each piece is made to be worn, reworn, and cherished.

The Burnout Cowl Top channels this spirit with its soft drape, delicate sheen, and romantic neckline. Designed to catch the light and turn heads, it’s an effortless statement - perfect for golden hour dinners, rooftop drinks, or wherever the warm breeze takes you.

Think timeless silhouettes with a romantic edge, curated in limited runs to keep you feeling one of a kind - wherever the sun takes you.

  • Fully adjustable ties at the back
  • Backless
  • Cowl neck design 
  • Available in powder blue or cream
  • Wear on its own or part of a set

Body (HTML):
The bikini of the season. Turn heads this summer in our wide band bikini set - the ultimate flattering fit. Featuring double layered fabric in a stylish wide band cut designed to sit on your hips at the perfect height, this is the staple swim you’ll be reaching for again and again.
